## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any issue (Closes #123). -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` is clean (0 errors) and `npx tsc -b` passes
- [ ] `npm test` (vitest) passes; added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Ran `npm run dev` and verified the behavior at runtime (for UI changes)
- [ ] Added a changeset (`npm run changeset`) if this changes shipped behavior
- [ ] Stayed inside the SDK boundary (no new `@/...` imports from `examples/`)
- [ ] Updated docs (guides / CHANGELOG via changeset) if the public surface changed

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything non-obvious: tradeoffs, follow-ups, screenshots. -->
